name: Image Gallery
description: A minimal image gallery backed by platform Assets, with optional labelled slots that other apps can discover and subscribe to

charmiq.command.name: addItems
charmiq.command.description: Open the platform media picker and append chosen images to the gallery; returns the new itemIds

charmiq.command.name: removeItem
charmiq.command.description: Remove an item from the gallery by itemId (and unbinds it from any slots)

charmiq.command.name: getItems
charmiq.command.description: Return the current items in the gallery (assetId, downloadUrl, mime, size)

charmiq.command.name: getSlots
charmiq.command.description: Return the current slot definitions and their bindings (empty array when no slots are configured)

charmiq.command.name: bindSlot
charmiq.command.description: Bind an itemId to a slot, or pass itemId=null to clear the slot

charmiq.command.name: setSlotMeta
charmiq.command.description: Attach consumer-defined metadata to a slot (opaque to the gallery, round-tripped to subscribers)

charmiq.command.name: clearAllSlots
charmiq.command.description: Unbind every slot without touching the items collection
